1.description: Construction of the Auxiliary Graph G ′ Notes . The bold edges in G ′ ( c ) denote the live edges ( i , j ) ∈ E such that c ij = 1. For the seed set S = { 1 , 2 , 3 } under the realization c , the maximum flow value is Z ( c , S ) = 3 and R ( c , S ) = 6 . Node 6 is not reachable under realization c , whereas it is reachable in the original graph.

3.description: A Graph with Two Components: A Star Graph with Origin a and a Collection of Four Line Graphs with Common Origin b

7.description: Schematic Illustration of d S ( τ ) as a Function of τ Notes . The graph coincides (up to discontinuities) with the CDF of R ( c ˜ , S ) , where c ˜ ∼ θ * , the correlation-robust distribution of Corollary 4 . The area of the shaded region is α · CVaR α corr ( S ) ; see Equation (17)
